lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and some minor dents. The interior shows signs of use and aging. It is currently operational but may require maintenance or minor repairs in the near future.
Fair condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require major repairs.

This vehicle is in mint condition, having been meticulously maintained to showroom standards. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, original shine and no visible imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine, featuring high-quality materials that look and feel brand new. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, offering a smooth and responsive driving experience. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail.

Get ready to hit the road in style with this fantastic vehicle! It's in good condition, having been well-cared for and maintained to ensure a smooth, reliable ride. While it shows a few minor signs of previous adventures, it still looks sharp and performs beautifully. This is a wonderful opportunity to own a high-quality car that's ready for many more miles of memories!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows the expected signs of regular use over the years. The exterior paint has begun to fade on the roof and hood, and there are several noticeable scratches and small door dings around the body. Inside, the cabin exhibits wear on the driver's seat and some light staining on the rear carpets. While it remains mechanically reliable for daily driving, a prospective buyer should anticipate upcoming maintenance needs such as new tires or a brake service. It is an honest, functional car for someone prioritizing utility and value over cosmetic perfection.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. It offers a seamless driving experience, characterized by reliable performance and a well-preserved interior. This offering represents a superior balance of value and quality for the discerning motorist.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I’ve made sure to keep up with everything so it's ready to go for you! Come take it for a spin, I know you'll love it!

This E46 M3 remains a driver-focused masterpiece, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to the rear wheels via a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is preserved with documented subframe reinforcement, while the suspension retains its factory-spec McPherson struts and multi-link rear setup for sharp turn-in and balanced lateral grip. Recent maintenance includes a shim-and-bucket valve adjustment and a cooling system overhaul. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering a pure analog driving experience with a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline.
Reliable daily driver. Mechanicals sound. Minor exterior wear. Clean title. Ready for inspection.

Experience a blend of performance and comfort with this meticulously maintained vehicle. The exterior shines with a deep gloss, showing only the lightest evidence of careful road use. Step inside to a smoke-free interior featuring pristine upholstery and a full suite of functional tech, including premium audio and navigation. Mechanically, this car is in its prime, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced at every recommended interval. It offers a solid, quiet ride that proves it was cherished by its previous owner. A reliable, attractive choice for the discerning driver who values both

We are pleased to present this professionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical reliability and structural integrity. Featuring a well-preserved aesthetic and a refined interior, it offers a sophisticated driving experience that balances performance with long-term value. This vehicle stands as a testament to quality care and is prepared for immediate acquisition.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained example of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, reflecting a history of diligent care. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure optimal performance and safety, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-value investment.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really wonderful shape, runs super smooth, and has been well-maintained over the years. Perfect for someone who wants a reliable car that still looks fantastic on the road. I’m sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to love it just as much as I do! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example retains its factory-spec 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox, providing precise gear selection and tactile feedback. The chassis exhibits excellent torsional rigidity, complemented by a limited-slip differential that ensures optimal power distribution during corner exit. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe inspection, securing the structural integrity of the rear mounting points. The suspension geometry remains true, delivering the communicative steering feel and balanced weight distribution synonymous with this platform. Minor aesthetic wear is present
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This 2019 Lexus RX 350 represents the perfect balance of luxury and reliability. Finished in a timeless Eminent White Pearl, the exterior retains its deep luster, showing only the expected minor road peppering on the front fascia from regular highway commutes. Inside, the Parchment leather interior remains plush and inviting; while the driver’s seat shows very light entry wear on the bolster, the cabin is strictly non-smoker and the walnut wood trim is pristine. Every technological feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium navigation system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this vehicle has been fastidiously maintained with a documented service history. It provides a whisper-quiet ride with smooth gear transitions and confident braking. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the vehicle has passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection. This is a solid, honest luxury SUV that has been treated with respect

I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the pavement for many more miles. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a reliable and comfortable driving experience, perfect for those seeking a balance of performance and value. The exterior retains a strong luster with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic blemishes, while the interior remains clean and smoke-free, featuring leather seats in excellent shape. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts precisely, and all electronics are fully functional. It has been serviced regularly, with recent oil changes and a fresh set of tires. This car represents a solid investment for a driver who appreciates a vehicle that has been cared for and is ready for the road without immediate needs.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist. This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This is a premier choice for those seeking a high-caliber vehicle that delivers consistent excellence on the road.

Hey there! I'm looking for a new home for this wonderful ride. It’s been so reliable and is in really great shape, both inside and out. It drives like a dream and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready for its next big adventure. Come check it out and see for yourself—you're going to love it!

The chassis has been maintained with mechanical longevity in mind, including a reinforced rear subframe and a serviced VANOS unit to ensure precise valve timing. The suspension geometry remains true, benefiting from recent bushing replacements to maintain the car's legendary lateral grip and
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Engine runs smooth. Interior well-kept. Minor exterior scratches. Maintenance records available.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and day-to-day practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful use, while the smoke-free interior offers a clean, comfortable cabin with all electronics and climate controls functioning perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced religiously; I have included a complete folder of maintenance records, including a recent oil change and brake inspection. It handles beautifully on both city streets and highways, providing a reliable and refined driving experience. With a clean title in hand and tires in great shape, this car is ready for its next chapter without needing immediate investment.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value.
